---
title: "SLAM Metabolic Class -- Figure Deck"
author: "..."
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

<!--
  Scrollable deck of every publication figure, one panel at a time.

  WHAT THIS FILE DOES
    Loops over figures/figure_spec.R and, for each panel, writes it to
    output/panels/<id>.png and displays it with its label. Nothing else --
    no page layout, no grid assembly, no legend stitching. Composition
    happens downstream (Canva); this file is the inventory.

  TO CHANGE WHICH PANELS APPEAR, OR THEIR ORDER OR NUMBERING
    Edit figures/figure_spec.R. Do not edit this file.

  TO CHANGE HOW PANELS LOOK
    Edit ../99_pub_ready_figs/pub_ready_figs.R. Style must be applied before
    the plots are rasterised -- by the time a panel reaches this file it is
    already a PNG and its appearance is fixed.

  OUTPUTS
    output/panels/1A.png, 1B.png, ... S1A.png, ...   flat, one per panel
    output/tables/hr_*.png                            HR tables built below
    output/panel_index.csv                            panel -> source map
-->

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# library(helphlme)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
# library(survival)
# library(survminer)
library(ggplotify)
# library(sjPlot)
# library(lme4)
library(cowplot)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(consoler)
library(flextable)
# library(future)
library(magick)
library(gridExtra)
set.seed(365)

# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r spec and helpers}
source("figure_spec.R")

PANEL_DIR <- file.path("output", "panels")
TABLE_DIR <- file.path("output", "tables")
for (d in c(PANEL_DIR, TABLE_DIR)) if (!dir.exists(d)) dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE)

max_width <- 7   # used by the flextable fit_to_width calls below

# Figure ids: primary -> "1","2",... ; supplemental -> "S1","S2",...
# Derived from position in FIGURES, so deleting or reordering a figure
# renumbers everything automatically.
figure_ids <- local({
  n <- list(primary = 0L, supplemental = 0L, abstract = 0L)
  vapply(FIGURES, function(f) {
    n[[f$part]] <<- n[[f$part]] + 1L
    if (f$part == "abstract") "GA" else paste0(if (f$part == "supplemental") "S" else "", n[[f$part]])
  }, character(1))
})

# Panel id: figure id + letter by position -> "S2C"
panel_id <- function(fig_id, i) if (fig_id == "GA") "GA" else paste0(fig_id, LETTERS[i])
```

```{r load stage outputs, include=FALSE}
# this loads in all the tables
all_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
fb6_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
fhet3_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
mb6_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
mhet3_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
itp_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/itp_c10c11c13c16_age_controls_bw/workspace.RDATA"
held_out_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"

config <- NULL

# Define a named list of input paths and environment names
render_tasks <- list(
  all_env = all_path,
  fb6_env = fb6_path,
  fhet3_env = fhet3_path,
  mb6_env = mb6_path,
  mhet3_env = mhet3_path,
  itp_env = itp_path,
  held_out_env = held_out_path
)

lapply(names(render_tasks), function(env_name) {
  env <- new.env()
  input_path <- render_tasks[[env_name]]
  load(input_path, envir = env)
  assign(env_name, env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
})
```

# Tables

The HR tables live in each stage-07 workspace (`save_figtabs`) rather than as
files, so they are rendered here. Each writes to its own name under
`output/tables/` and is referenced by path from `figure_spec.R`.

```{r build tables, results='hide'}

# ---- hr_all ----------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, all_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_all.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_sexstrain_bw -------------------------------------------------
cbind_hr_table <- function(strata, hr_table) {
  cbind(sex_strain = strata, Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
}

hr_table <- rbind(
  cbind_hr_table("fb6", fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mb6", mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("fhet3", fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mhet3", mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]])
)
rownames(hr_table) <- NULL

hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_sexstrain_bw.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_treatment ----------------------------------------------------
load("../97_treatment_response/output/hr_table/hr_table.RDATA")

hr_table <- do.call(rbind, hrs_table) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_treatment.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_itp ----------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- itp_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_itp.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_sexstrain_fat ------------------------------------------------
cbind_hr_table <- function(strata, hr_table) {
  cbind(sex_strain = strata, Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
}

hr_table <- rbind(
  cbind_hr_table("fb6", fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[2]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mb6", mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[2]]),
  cbind_hr_table("fhet3", fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[2]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mhet3", mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[2]])
)
rownames(hr_table) <- NULL

hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_sexstrain_fat.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_sexstrain_gluc -----------------------------------------------
cbind_hr_table <- function(strata, hr_table) {
  if (is.null(hr_table)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  cbind(sex_strain = strata, Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
}

hr_table <- rbind(
  cbind_hr_table("fb6", fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[3]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mb6", mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[3]]),
  cbind_hr_table("fhet3", fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[3]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mhet3", mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[3]])
)
rownames(hr_table) <- NULL

hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_sexstrain_gluc.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_km_external --------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- held_out_env$save_figtabs$km_hr_combine_validation_panels_hr
hr_table <- lapply(hr_table, function(table) {
  table <- cbind(Tertile = seq_len(nrow(table)) + 1, table)
  table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(table), table)
  table$column <- rep(colnames(table)[3], nrow(table))
  colnames(table)[3] <- "HR"
  rownames(table) <- NULL
  table
})
hr_table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- hr_table[1:10]
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_km_external.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_fb6 ----------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_fb6.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_fhet3 --------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_fhet3.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_mb6 ----------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_mb6.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_mhet3 --------------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_mhet3.png", zoom = 10))

# ---- hr_km_internal --------------------------------------------------
hr_table <- all_env$save_figtabs$km_hr_combine_validation_panels_hr
hr_table <- lapply(hr_table, function(table) {
  table <- cbind(Tertile = seq_len(nrow(table)) + 1, table)
  table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(table), table)
  table$column <- rep(colnames(table)[3], nrow(table))
  colnames(table)[3] <- "HR"
  rownames(table) <- NULL
  table
})
hr_table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- hr_table[1:10]
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/tables/hr_km_internal.png", zoom = 10))
```

# Figures

```{r render figures, results='asis'}
missing_panels <- character(0)

for (fi in seq_along(FIGURES)) {
  f      <- FIGURES[[fi]]
  fig_id <- figure_ids[[fi]]

  cat("\n\n## ", fig_id, ". ", f$title, "\n\n", sep = "")

  for (i in seq_along(f$panels)) {
    id   <- panel_id(fig_id, i)
    path <- f$panels[[i]]

    if (!file.exists(path)) {
      missing_panels <- c(missing_panels, paste0(id, "  ", path))
      cat("\n**", id, "** -- MISSING: `", path, "`\n\n", sep = "")
      next
    }

    out <- file.path(PANEL_DIR, paste0(id, ".png"))
    magick::image_write(magick::image_read(path), out, format = "png")

    cat("\n**", id, "**  \n", sep = "")
    cat("<sub>`", path, "`</sub>\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("![](", out, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  }
}
```

```{r missing summary, results='asis'}
if (length(missing_panels)) {
  cat("\n\n# Missing panels\n\n")
  cat(paste0("- `", missing_panels, "`"), sep = "\n")
} 
```

# Panel index

```{r index}
idx <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(FIGURES), function(fi) {
  f <- FIGURES[[fi]]
  data.frame(
    panel  = vapply(seq_along(f$panels), function(i) panel_id(figure_ids[[fi]], i), ""),
    figure = paste0(figure_ids[[fi]], ". ", f$title),
    source = unlist(f$panels),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
write.csv(idx, file.path("output", "panel_index.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
knitr::kable(idx)
```
